editorial_accuracy.notes: Unchanged. 133 evidence blocks, all sources clean.

information_design.notes: New minimalist header with logo mark, condensed nav, icon-only actions. Cleaner visual hierarchy.

ui_ux_typography.notes: Run 19: Header rebuilt — V logo mark + VERITAS wordmark, 3 primary nav links + More dropdown, icon-only support/auth/theme buttons. Mobile drawer preserved. Font preload hints for FCP improvement.

code_quality.notes: Font weights trimmed (Playfair 10→4, Inter 5→4). Preload hints for critical fonts. Build clean, zero TS errors.

accessibility.notes: All header buttons have aria-labels and 44px touch targets. More dropdown has aria-expanded/haspopup. Skip link preserved.
